landing.title: The Brand Wall
landing.subtitle: A pixel mosaic of indie brands from {count} countries. Every block is a brand. Every path is a country. Click to explore.
landing.no_brands: No brands found. Try a different filter or submit one below.
landing.footer_inspired: Inspired by The Million Dollar Homepage (2005)

georgia.description: 8,000 years of winemaking. Tbilisi's tech ecosystem raised a record $180M in 2024. From qvevri cellars to crash-game unicorns — the Caucasus is building.

submit.submit_brand_cta: + Submit a brand to The Wall

share.share_georgia_text: Explore 24+ indie brands from Georgia 🇬🇪 — from Spribe to Binekhi — on The Brand Wall.
share.share_brand_text: Check out {name} on The Brand Wall — indie brands from around the world.
share.share_submitted_text: I just submitted a brand to The Brand Wall — the pixel mosaic of indie brands from 11 countries. Add yours:
